name: Input Handler
description: Centralized input management with action mapping and input buffering. Provides clean input state queries and supports input remapping at runtime.

action_pressed.description: Emitted when an action is first pressed

action_released.description: Emitted when an action is released

is_action_pressed.description: Check if action is currently held down

is_action_just_pressed.description: Check if action was just pressed this frame

is_action_buffered.description: Check if action was pressed within buffer window

consume_buffer.description: Consume a buffered input (prevents it from triggering again)

get_axis.description: Get axis value between two actions (-1 to 1)

get_vector.description: Get 2D input vector from four directional actions
